landingTitle: XiaoYu makes learning more efficient. Conversation is learning.
landingDesc: Your personal learning agent — from data analysis to knowledge explanation, all in one place.
typewriterWords: Ask XiaoYu to create a study plan
Let XiaoYu analyze your weak areas
Let XiaoYu check your review progress

skills.label: Analyze Weak Points
skills.prompt: Help me identify my weak areas and suggest improvements

skills.label: Create Study Plan
skills.prompt: Create a study plan based on my current status

skills.label: Review Tasks
skills.prompt: Show me what I need to review today

skills.label: Learning Overview
skills.prompt: Analyze my learning data and show the big picture

skills.label: Recommend Courses
skills.prompt: Recommend courses based on my weak areas

skills.label: Explain a Concept
skills.prompt: Please explain a knowledge point to me

skills.label: Analyze a Question
skills.prompt: Help me analyze the solution approach for this question

skills.label: Summarize Knowledge
skills.prompt: Help me summarize the key points of a topic

skills.label: Take Diagnostic Test
skills.prompt: Help me take a diagnostic test to assess my level

skills.label: Review Mistakes
skills.prompt: Help me analyze my mistakes and find weak areas

skills.label: Start Practice
skills.prompt: Give me a few questions to practice

newUserDesc: Understand your learning level in 5 minutes. XiaoYu will create a personalized study plan for you.
noPlanHint: Chat with XiaoYu to create one
heatmapEmpty: Your daily activity will appear here once you start learning
dashboardErrorHint: Please check your network and try again, or contact your teacher for help
